description: Fix BUG-3: Shared-UI motion/a11y polish - ensure reduced-motion is fully respected across all animated components. Several components still use CSS animate-spin/animate-bounce/animate-pulse without reduced-motion guards outside of the LoadingState (which was fixed). Fix Button.tsx spinner, Loader.tsx, AIChat.tsx typing indicator, TypingIndicator.tsx, AgentMiniWidget.tsx, and SearchInput.tsx to respect prefers-reduced-motion. Also ensure MotionProvider is actually consumed (or components use useMotionConfig which already exists and works). Add 'use client' directives to any motion components missing them.
steps: 1. In packages/shared-ui/src/components/Button.tsx - the loading spinner uses animate-spin unconditionally. Wrap it: if user prefers reduced motion, show a static spinner indicator instead of animate-spin.

2. In packages/shared-ui/src/components/Loader.tsx - all 4 variants (ring/dots/pulse/skeleton) use animate-spin, animate-bounce, animate-pulse unconditionally. Add reduced-motion check: import useReducedMotion from framer-motion (or use useMotionConfig), conditionally remove animation classes.
3. In packages/shared-ui/src/components/AI/AIChat.tsx - lines 67, 79-81 use animate-pulse and animate-bounce for streaming/typing indicators. Add reduced-motion check.
4. In packages/shared-ui/src/components/Chat/TypingIndicator.tsx - lines 27-29 use animate-bounce. Add reduced-motion check.
5. In packages/shared-ui/src/components/Form/SearchInput.tsx - line 76 uses animate-spin. Add reduced-motion check.
6. In packages/shared-ui/src/agent/AgentMiniWidget.tsx - line 28 uses animate-pulse. Add reduced-motion check.

7. Verify all motion components in packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/ have 'use client' directive (check AnimatedList, AnimatedPage, AnimatedSkeleton, BottomSheet, FadeIn, PageTransition, PullToRefresh, ScaleOnHover, SkeletonFade, SlidePanel, SpringButton, StaggerList).
8. Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/shared-ui and pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/shared-ui to verify no regressions.
acceptance_criteria: grep -rn 'animate-spin\|animate-bounce\|animate-pulse' packages/shared-ui/src/ --include='*.tsx' | grep -v '__tests__' shows ZERO lines without a reduced-motion conditional guard
All motion components in packages/shared-ui/src/components/Motion/ have 'use client' directive
findings: Fixed 11 components total (6 originally specified + 5 additional: Skeleton, VoiceInput, MediaPlayer/ImageViewer, MeetingRoom, KnockFlow). All Motion components already had 'use client' directives. The QuantLive components (QuantLiveOrb, QuantLiveActionChip) use motion-reduce:animate-none Tailwind utility which is also a valid CSS reduced-motion guard. Prettier reformatted some files via pre-commit hook but all tests (257) and typecheck pass.
